children.name: Led the complete redesign of a major e-commerce platform, improving conversion rates by 34% through streamlined checkout flows and enhanced product discovery.

children.name: Designed a comprehensive health tracking app from concept to launch. Features include meal planning, workout tracking, and sleep analysis with data visualization.

children.name: Built a scalable design system used by 50+ designers and 30+ developers. Includes component library, token architecture, and documentation platform.

children.name: Created the UX for an AI-powered content creation tool. Designed intuitive interfaces for complex ML workflows, making AI accessible to non-technical users.
